mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_AI_CHAT_LOG (S_ID, S_QUESTION, S_INTENT, I_SUCCESS, I_DEGRADED, S_TENANT_ID, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sQuestion}, #{sIntent}, #{iSuccess}, #{iDegraded}, #{sTenantId}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
